mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_batch ( year, month, status, employee_count, total_net_pay, submitter_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{year}, #{month}, #{status}, #{employeeCount}, #{totalNetPay}, #{submitterId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM salary_batch WHERE year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
SELECT * FROM salary_batch ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE salary_batch SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE salary_batch SET employee_count = #{employeeCount}, total_net_pay = #{totalNetPay}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE salary_batch SET submitter_id = #{submitterId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
